title: The Rise of Quantum Edge Computing
content: Quantum hardware is shrinking and moving closer to the data source. We are exploring the architectural implications of deploying cryogenic edge systems for low-latency decentralized networks.

title: Zero Knowledge Proofs in Modern Databases
content: Cryptographic guarantees are replacing trust-based access control. Learn how zero-knowledge databases are enabling secure collaborative computing without exposing raw underlying telemetry.

title: Autonomous AI Agents on Web3 Infrastructure
content: AI agents are transitioning from API clients to sovereign economic actors. Our latest research dives into the micro-payment protocols enabling agents to lease compute autonomously.

title: Neuromorphic Chips Bypass Silicon Limits
content: Traditional Von Neumann architectures are hitting an efficiency wall. Neuromorphic processing units mimicking physical synaptic behavior represent the next epoch of hardware design.

title: The Architecture of Decentralized Identifiers
content: Decentralized identity (DID) standards are finally reaching production readiness. We analyze how sovereign public key rings can secure multi-agent systems and prevent identity fraud.
